name: allternit-excel
description: Deep Excel automation — formulas, charts, tables, financial modeling, data validation. Generates and executes Office.js code directly in the workbook.

commands.name: excel:analyze
commands.description: Analyze and summarize the selected range

commands.name: excel:formula
commands.description: Generate a formula for the selected cell/range

commands.name: excel:chart
commands.description: Create a chart from the selected data

commands.name: excel:table
commands.description: Convert the selected range into a structured table

commands.name: excel:format
commands.description: Apply professional formatting to the selection

commands.name: excel:model
commands.description: Build or extend a financial model scaffold

commands.name: excel:clean
commands.description: Remove errors and standardize formats in selection
